Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Storm madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — A lightning falcon detonated into a field of storm madra.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Storm madra can be composed of many lesser aspects woven together.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Powerful storm madra appeared over the cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — A river of storm madra crashed down on the ship from a portal.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yushi crackles with storm madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Storm madra can be shot as bolts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon sent storm madra shooting up Lindon’s feet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Storm madra was bursting from the mangled madra channels in uncontrolled flares.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Wavedancer holds storm madra.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Storm madra can seize a person.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
